title: Linux Kernel Module Loaded from Temp Directory
description: Detects loading of kernel modules from temporary directories (/tmp, /dev/shm, /var/tmp), a strong indicator of rootkit installation.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (('Process Name' = 'insmod' and (msg like '*/tmp/*' or msg like '*/dev/shm/*' or msg like '*/var/tmp/*')))
